original_text: American Express operates in the Financial - Credit Services industry and provides charge and credit payment card products and travel-related services worldwide. The company operates through Global Consumer Services Group and Global Commercial Services segments. In Q3 2025, American Express reported net income of $2,902,000,000, representing a net margin of 27.86%.
revised_text: American Express operates in the Financial - Credit Services industry and provides charge and credit payment card products and travel-related services worldwide. The company operates through three segments: Global Consumer Services Group, Global Commercial Services, and Global Merchant and Network Services. In Q3 2025, American Express reported net income of $2,902,000,000, representing a net margin of 27.86%.
changes_summary: Corrected the business segment description to include all three segments (adding Global Merchant and Network Services) as specified in C002, resolving the citation mismatch and internal inconsistency issues. Retained Q3 2025 net income and net margin figures as they are supported by C003, C005, and C006.
